recommendations.title: The World Is Yours
recommendations.overview: To escape his life of crime, a Paris drug dealer takes on one last job involving Spain, unhinged gangsters, his longtime crush and his scheming mother.

recommendations.title: Athena
recommendations.overview: Hours after the tragic death of their youngest brother in unexplained circumstances, three siblings have their lives thrown into chaos.

recommendations.title: Ratatouille
recommendations.overview: Remy, a rat living in Paris, possesses a palate far more refined than that of his fellow comrades. He dreams of becoming a chef, determined to create culinary masterpieces rather than scavenge for scraps. When fate deposits him in the sewers beneath

recommendations.title: Burke & Hare
recommendations.overview: Two 19th-century opportunists become serial killers so that they can maintain their profitable business supplying cadavers to an anatomist.

recommendations.title: My Policeman
recommendations.overview: In the late 1990s, the arrival of elderly invalid Patrick into Marion and Tom’s home triggers the exploration of seismic events from 40 years previous: the passionate relationship between Tom and Patrick at a time when homosexuality was illegal.

recommendations.title: The Barbarian Invasions
recommendations.overview: In this belated sequel to 'The Decline of the American Empire', middle-aged Montreal college professor, Remy, learns that he is dying of liver cancer. His ex-wife, Louise, asks their estranged son, Sebastian, a successful businessman living in London

recommendations.title: Babysitting

recommendations.title: Auntie Mame

recommendations.title: You'll Never Find Me
recommendations.overview: Patrick, a strange and lonely resident, lives in a mobile home at the back of an isolated caravan park. After a violent thunderstorm erupts, a mysterious young woman appears at his door, seeking shelter from the weather. The longer the night wears on

recommendations.title: Bang Bang You're Dead
recommendations.overview: A troubled and bullied high school student fights against judgement from his community after threatening to bomb the football team.
